channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Global Economy Faces One Choke Point After Another
item.description: "Choke point" is having a moment. Why it matters: The term is an increasingly popular shorthand for bottlenecks in the oil market and the AI supply chain.

item.title: Behind the Curtain: The AI titans' biggest private fear
item.description: We ask almost every AI architect and leader the same thing in private: What AI risk worries you most? Almost all of them fire back the same response: ...

item.title: Republicans skeptical Darline Graham can win a full Senate term
item.description: She has President Trump 's endorsement and is a sympathetic figure after the death of her brother, Sen. Lindsey Graham . As Graham's temporary replace...

item.title: Senate preparing to vote on Russia sanctions next week
item.description: Democrats are indicating to their Republican counterparts that they are prepared to vote as early as next week on a Russia sanctions package that incl...
